description: Use this API to remove a file from the specified group. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = scenariofileremove(sgroup, sfile)

parameters.name: sgroup
parameters.description: Name of the group to remove a file from. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Name of the file to be removed. (input; no default allowed).
